requirement_topic.en: Transport — UN 38.3 and Colombia Entry Logistics
requirement_topic.zh: 运输——UN 38.3 与哥伦比亚入境物流
requirement_topic.zht: 運輸——UN 38.3 與哥倫比亞入境物流

summary.en: Lithium batteries and power banks are treated as dangerous goods for transport planning. Exporters should retain valid UN 38.3 transport evidence for each model and battery configuration and ensure Cartagena and Buenaventura port acceptance conditions are met in customs and freight documentation.
summary.zh: 锂电池和移动电源在运输环节按危险品处理，应对每一型号和电池配置保留有效的 UN 38.3 证明，并确保卡塔赫纳和布埃纳文图拉等口岸的承运、报关和接收条件文件齐备。
summary.zht: 鋰電池與行動電源在運輸環節按危險品處理，應對每一型號及電池組態保留有效之 UN 38.3 證據，並確保卡塔赫納和布埃納文圖拉等港口的承運、報關及接收條件文件齊全。

standards_or_laws: UN Manual of Tests and Criteria Part III, Section 38.3 (lithium batteries)
Dangerous goods transport document requirements for air and sea channels
Port entry and carrier acceptance procedures at Cartagena and Buenaventura

summary.en: China requires UN 38.3 and shipment safety documentation as part of dangerous-goods logistics, which is relevant baseline material. However, it remains a transport baseline, not the full Colombia customs and destination clearance package.
summary.zh: 中国也要求在危险品物流中提供 UN 38.3 和运输安全文件，这构成有价值的基础材料，但仅为运输底层要求，不能替代哥伦比亚完整的海关与目的地清关包装。
summary.zht: 中國同樣要求在危險品物流中提供 UN 38.3 與運輸安全文件，這是有價值之基礎材料，但僅為運輸底層要求，不能替代哥倫比亞完整之海關與目的地清關包。

standards_or_laws: UN 38.3-based export documentation used in Chinese shipment process
China Compulsory Certification (CCC) where category mandates are applicable
China customs transport and declaration documentation

gap.en: Most non-compliances come from model drift and incomplete transfer evidence. A change in chemistry, shell, or packaging can invalidate UN reports, so exporter files must be model-specific and synchronized with Cartagena/Buenaventura entry workflows.
gap.zh: 主要差距通常来自型号变化与转移证据链不完整。化学体系、外形或包装变更可能使 UN 证书失效，需按卡塔赫纳/布埃纳文图拉口岸流程同步更新。
gap.zht: 主要差距通常來自型號變更與轉移證據鏈不完整。化學體系、外形或包裝變更可能使 UN 證書失效，需按卡塔赫納/布埃納文圖拉口岸流程同步更新。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for lithium battery logistics and required to support dangerous-goods handling and Colombia port clearance
mandatory_status.cn: UN 38.3 and shipment logistics documentation are mandatory for many China-origin shipments; they remain baseline evidence for transport, not a full Colombia destination approval by themselves.

source.publisher: UN Economic Commission for Europe, UN Manual of Tests and Criteria (UN 38.3)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] UN 38.3 is required for transport, but destination readiness in Colombia also depends on port documentation discipline and importer coordination at Cartagena/Buenaventura.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] UN 38.3 是运输必要文件，但哥伦比亚目的地可进入性还取决于卡塔赫纳/布埃纳文图拉口岸文件纪律及进口方协调。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] UN 38.3 是運輸必要文件，但哥倫比亞目的地可進入性仍取決於卡塔赫納/布埃納文圖拉口岸文件紀律及進口方協調。
